zh.lifeSummary: 當Willelma De La Mare於1363年出生在英國維爾爾韋斯特 拉維頓時，她的父親Sir Robert de la Mare49歲，母親Maud De Hastings26歲。她和Sir John De La Roche至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1410年10月31日享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Willelma De La Mare于1363年出生在英国維爾爾韋斯特 拉維頓时，她的父亲Sir Robert de la Mare49岁，母亲Maud De Hastings26岁。她和Sir John De La Roche至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1410年10月31日享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Mare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Americo, Cesareo, Fernando, Ines, Javier, Jose, Marcos.  Portuguese Henrique.  Italian Antonio, Gino, Olindo, Silvio, Vito.  Dutch Andries.
Italian: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mare ‘sea’.
English: variant of   Mear  .

variants.name: Marucci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Antonio, Silvio, Angelo, Carmela, Domenic, Donato, Egidio, Guido, Licinio, Lorenzo, Luciano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Maruccio, a pet form of Mare or Mari .

variants.name: Marelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Giuseppe, Angelo, Dante.
Italian:
patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Mare  .

variants.name: Mear
meanings: Mear, a field; also from mear or mearh, a horse
Anglo-Saxon: Mere, lake, pool, sea

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Willelma De La Mare was born in 1363, in West Lavington, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir Robert de la Mare, was 49 and her mother, Maud De Hastings, was 26. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Sir John De La Roche. She died on 31 October 1410, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Willelma De La Mare est née en 1363, à West Lavington, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de la Mare, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Maud De Hastings, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Sir John De La Roche. Elle est décédée le 31 octobre 1410, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Willelma De La Mare 1363 in West Lavington, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de la Mare 49 und ihre Mutter Maud De Hastings 26. Sie hatte mit Sir John De La Roche mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Oktober 1410 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Willelma De La Mare è nata il nel 1363 nel West Lavington, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert de la Mare, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Maud De Hastings, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Sir John De La Roche. Morì il 31 ottobre 1410, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Willelma De La Mareが1363年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアウエスト ラヴィントンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de la Mareは49歳，母Maud De Hastingsは26歳であった。彼女はSir John De La Rocheとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1410年10月31日に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Willelma De La Mare(이)가 1363년 영국 윌츠히르 웨스트 래빙턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de la Mare(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud De Hastings(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Sir John De La Roche(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 10월 31일 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Lavington, Wiltshire, England, United Ki: Lavington, Wiltūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Willelma De La Mare nasceu em 1363, em West Lavington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de la Mare, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Maud De Hastings, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir John De La Roche. Ela faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1410, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Willelma De La Mare родилась в 1363 г. в местности вест лавингтон, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de la Mare было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud De Hastings, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Sir John De La Roche. Она умерла 31 октября 1410 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Willelma De La Mare nació en 1363, en West Lavington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de la Mare, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Maud De Hastings, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir John De La Roche. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1410, a la edad de 47 años.
